verses.text: To the mountains of Israel God speaks, because the enemy gloated, 'the ancient high places are ours.' Reproach answered. God takes up the cause of His scorned land.
To the mountains of Israel God speaks, because the enemy gloated, 'the ancient high places are ours.' Reproach answered. God takes up the cause of His scorned land.
To the mountains of Israel God speaks, because the enemy gloated, 'the ancient high places are ours.' Reproach answered. God takes up the cause of His scorned land.
He has spoken in fire against the heathen who seized His land; they shall bear their shame. Reversal. Those who plundered His people will be plundered in turn.
He has spoken in fire against the heathen who seized His land; they shall bear their shame. Reversal. Those who plundered His people will be plundered in turn.
He has spoken in fire against the heathen who seized His land; they shall bear their shame. Reversal. Those who plundered His people will be plundered in turn.
He has spoken in fire against the heathen who seized His land; they shall bear their shame. Reversal. Those who plundered His people will be plundered in turn.
But the mountains of Israel shall shoot forth branches and yield fruit, 'for they are at hand to come.' Revival near. God promises the desolate land a fruitful future.
But the mountains of Israel shall shoot forth branches and yield fruit, 'for they are at hand to come.' Revival near. God promises the desolate land a fruitful future.
He will multiply men and rebuild the cities, doing 'better unto you than at your beginnings.' Surpassing grace. God's restoration outshines even the former glory.
He will multiply men and rebuild the cities, doing 'better unto you than at your beginnings.' Surpassing grace. God's restoration outshines even the former glory.
He will multiply men and rebuild the cities, doing 'better unto you than at your beginnings.' Surpassing grace. God's restoration outshines even the former glory.
The land that 'devoured men' shall do so no more, nor bereave its people. Curse lifted. What had brought sorrow becomes a place of life.
The land that 'devoured men' shall do so no more, nor bereave its people. Curse lifted. What had brought sorrow becomes a place of life.
The land that 'devoured men' shall do so no more, nor bereave its people. Curse lifted. What had brought sorrow becomes a place of life.
When Israel dwelt there they defiled the land, so God scattered them among the nations. The reason given. Their exile was the just fruit of their sin.
When Israel dwelt there they defiled the land, so God scattered them among the nations. The reason given. Their exile was the just fruit of their sin.
When Israel dwelt there they defiled the land, so God scattered them among the nations. The reason given. Their exile was the just fruit of their sin.
When Israel dwelt there they defiled the land, so God scattered them among the nations. The reason given. Their exile was the just fruit of their sin.
Among the heathen they profaned His name, men saying, 'These are the people of the LORD.' Reproach to God. His people's failure dishonoured His name before the world.
Among the heathen they profaned His name, men saying, 'These are the people of the LORD.' Reproach to God. His people's failure dishonoured His name before the world.
Not for their sakes but 'for my holy name's sake' God will act, to sanctify His great name. Grace, not merit. Restoration springs from God's regard for His own glory.
Not for their sakes but 'for my holy name's sake' God will act, to sanctify His great name. Grace, not merit. Restoration springs from God's regard for His own glory.
He will gather them and 'sprinkle clean water upon you, and ye shall be clean' from all filthiness and idols. Cleansing promised. God washes His people before He renews them.
He will gather them and 'sprinkle clean water upon you, and ye shall be clean' from all filthiness and idols. Cleansing promised. God washes His people before He renews them.
'A new heart also will I give you, and a new spirit... I will take away the stony heart... and I will put my spirit within you.' The gospel of renewal. God remakes the heart He commands to obey.
'A new heart also will I give you, and a new spirit... I will take away the stony heart... and I will put my spirit within you.' The gospel of renewal. God remakes the heart He commands to obey.
They shall dwell in the land, be His people, and He their God; He will increase the corn and end famine. Covenant restored. Inward renewal flowers in outward blessing.
They shall dwell in the land, be His people, and He their God; He will increase the corn and end famine. Covenant restored. Inward renewal flowers in outward blessing.
They shall dwell in the land, be His people, and He their God; He will increase the corn and end famine. Covenant restored. Inward renewal flowers in outward blessing.
Then they shall remember their evil ways and 'loathe yourselves'; not for their sakes does He act. Grace humbles. Pardon, freely given, breeds true shame for sin.
Then they shall remember their evil ways and 'loathe yourselves'; not for their sakes does He act. Grace humbles. Pardon, freely given, breeds true shame for sin.
When cleansed, the cities shall be rebuilt, and the waste land become 'like the garden of Eden,' that the heathen may know. Eden restored. God's grace turns ruin into paradise as a witness.
When cleansed, the cities shall be rebuilt, and the waste land become 'like the garden of Eden,' that the heathen may know. Eden restored. God's grace turns ruin into paradise as a witness.
When cleansed, the cities shall be rebuilt, and the waste land become 'like the garden of Eden,' that the heathen may know. Eden restored. God's grace turns ruin into paradise as a witness.
When cleansed, the cities shall be rebuilt, and the waste land become 'like the garden of Eden,' that the heathen may know. Eden restored. God's grace turns ruin into paradise as a witness.
He will yet be inquired of to do this, and multiply His people 'as a flock.' Prayer invited. Even sovereign promises are to be sought from God in prayer.
He will yet be inquired of to do this, and multiply His people 'as a flock.' Prayer invited. Even sovereign promises are to be sought from God in prayer.
